Spring Data Core
  1. org.springframework.data.repository.core
  2. NamedQueries

Uses of Interface
org.springframework.data.repository.core.NamedQueries

Packages that use NamedQueries
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.repository.cdi
Base classes to implement CDI support for repositories.
org.springframework.data.repository.core.support
Base classes to implement repositories for various data stores.
org.springframework.data.repository.query
Support classes to work with query methods.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default Optional<NamedQueries>
    CdiRepositoryConfiguration.getNamedQueries()
    Return the NamedQueries to use.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    RepositoryFactoryBeanSupport.setNamedQueries(NamedQueries namedQueries)
    Setter to inject a NamedQueries instance.
    void
    RepositoryFactorySupport.setNamedQueries(@Nullable NamedQueries namedQueries)
    Configures a NamedQueries instance to be handed to the QueryLookupStrategy for query creation.

  • Uses of NamedQueries in org.springframework.data.repository.query

    Methods in org.springframework.data.repository.query with parameters of type NamedQueries
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RepositoryQuery
    QueryLookupStrategy.resolveQuery(Method method, RepositoryMetadata metadata, ProjectionFactory factory, NamedQueries namedQueries)
    Resolves a RepositoryQuery from the given QueryMethod that can be executed afterwards.
